hero.title:
More than a lodge…
A haven of natural peace
hero.subtitle: Más que un lodge… Un refugio de paz natural

intro.title: More than a lodge… A haven of natural peace
intro.text: Nestled in Bijagua, Costa Rica, Paraíso Celeste invites you to connect with nature. Minutes from Volcán Tenorio and Río Celeste Waterfall, every stay is a unique experience.

bungalow-colibri.name: Bungalow Hummingbird
bungalow-colibri.desc: An intimate refuge surrounded by nature.
bungalow-colibri.long: Immerse yourself in the tranquility of this private bungalow. Surrounded by lush vegetation, with every detail carefully considered to make your stay unforgettable.

bungalow-tucan.name: Bungalow Toucan
bungalow-tucan.desc: Surrounded by jungle, with amazing views.
bungalow-tucan.long: A space designed to connect with nature. Spacious, bright, and with all the details that make your stay a unique experience.

bungalow-perezoso.name: Bungalow Sloth
bungalow-perezoso.desc: Your personal sanctuary in the jungle.
bungalow-perezoso.long: Surrounded by lush vegetation, this bungalow offers the perfect combination of comfort and nature. Ideal for disconnecting from the world.

bungalow-tapir.name: Bungalow Tapir
bungalow-tapir.desc: The most exclusive, with a private pool.
bungalow-tapir.long: An oasis of privacy and luxury. With a private pool, panoramic terrace and the best sunsets at the resort. The ultimate experience.

items.title: Excellent Location
items.desc: In Bijagua, near Volcán Tenorio and Río Celeste.

items.title: Safe Place
items.desc: Total peace of mind and privacy.

location.title: In the heart of Bijagua
location.address: Del colono de Bijagua, 3 km southeast, Alajuela Province, Bijagua de Upala, Costa Rica.

bungalowsPage.subtitle: Four unique refuges designed to connect with nature without sacrificing comfort. Each bungalow has its own personality.
bungalowsPage.bookingText: Select your dates and book your bungalow.

footer.tagline: Where time moves slower. A luxury refuge in Bijagua, Costa Rica.
